beat.title: Recap and Raina's Plea
beat.boundaryReason: The opening stays in one continuous tavern setup scene: the DM recaps Hamri's recent history, brings the party together at the Leviathan, and has Raina explain the dreams, the song fragment, and the hidden cave she wants found.
dateEvidence: at u0090 the DM explicitly states, 'It is now May 26, 1749'
at u0098 the session proper begins 'in the evening of a pleasantly warm spring day'
nothing before u0246 suggests sleep, travel to another day, or a break from that opening evening meeting

transcriptLines.text: But in… in…
The Mawar Confederacy in Hamri, the winter is bitterly cold and storm-lashed, with repeated gales and then hard freezes that leave ice lingering far longer than it should.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0051 | 00:04:20.149-00:04:31.540 | DM] The Mawar Confederacy in Hamri, the winter is bitterly cold and storm-lashed, with repeated gales and then hard freezes that leave ice lingering far longer than it should.

transcriptLines.text: The town hunkers down.
It's a winter of hunger and hardship, where people speak in low voices of nightmares and strange songs on the wind, though.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0053 | 00:04:36.120-00:04:44.120 | DM] It's a winter of hunger and hardship, where people speak in low voices of nightmares and strange songs on the wind, though.

transcriptLines.text: No supernatural danger ever really emerges.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0054 | 00:04:44.120-00:04:47.229 | DM] No supernatural danger ever really emerges.

transcriptLines.text: But the ordinary dangers are enough, cold, hunger, and isolation take the toll, and for many families, that's a winter of loss.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0055 | 00:04:47.760-00:04:55.189 | DM] But the ordinary dangers are enough, cold, hunger, and isolation take the toll, and for many families, that's a winter of loss.

transcriptLines.text: Little news comes in or out, and the Leviathan stands quiet.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0056 | 00:04:56.180-00:05:00.399 | DM] Little news comes in or out, and the Leviathan stands quiet.

transcriptLines.text: Through the long, hard winter.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0057 | 00:05:01.100-00:05:04.030 | DM] Through the long, hard winter.

transcriptLines.text: Into April, when spring comes late, a month of dreary rain and shuttered harbors, weeks of gray weather.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0058 | 00:05:04.870-00:05:12.819 | DM] Into April, when spring comes late, a month of dreary rain and shuttered harbors, weeks of gray weather.

transcriptLines.text: half-trad roads… Mud.
It's not till May of that year that the winter… that the weather finally breaks. And as spring turns to summer, the port of Hamri fills with news and trade.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0060 | 00:05:17.200-00:05:26.160 | DM] It's not till May of that year that the winter… that the weather finally breaks. And as spring turns to summer, the port of Hamri fills with news and trade.

transcriptLines.text: Wild rumors from the north of an ancient black dragon, a vicious beast that defeated even the best Chardonian legions, and drove the orc warlord Grumella before him in fear, finally killed by the heroes of the Battle of Voltara.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0061 | 00:05:26.550-00:05:42.069 | DM] Wild rumors from the north of an ancient black dragon, a vicious beast that defeated even the best Chardonian legions, and drove the orc warlord Grumella before him in fear, finally killed by the heroes of the Battle of Voltara.

transcriptLines.text: From Chardon, the tales in the spring repeat the common refrains. The merchants and traders tell stories of the wealth and glory of empire.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0062 | 00:05:42.480-00:05:51.129 | DM] From Chardon, the tales in the spring repeat the common refrains. The merchants and traders tell stories of the wealth and glory of empire.

transcriptLines.text: Others tell stories of the tightening fists of the wizards of the Academy. Rumors of scholarly expeditions sent to plunder treasure, ancient artifacts of magic and power.
transcriptLines.raw: [u0063 | 00:05:51.810-00:06:02.039 | DM] Others tell stories of the tightening fists of the wizards of the Academy. Rumors of scholarly expeditions sent to plunder treasure, ancient artifacts of magic and power.

transcriptLines.text: from all.
Points of the compass.

transcriptLines.text: As summer chose to fall, rumors spread from the south of a daring theft, the merchants say. Powerful magic stolen from a great wizard of Chardon, who was viciously attacked and betrayed by outsiders in the city. Something about a giant's crown full of ancient elemental magic.

transcriptLines.text: Wondering what these events meant for Mawar.

transcriptLines.text: Could it be long before Chardon looked to claim Mawar itself. After all, Arian the Mistspeaker had long spoken of the Mawakel Peninsula, which is where the Mawar Confederacy is, as an important locus of elemental power, and Arian's scrolls of elemental power had turned up in Chardon recently, Kaiso had learned.

transcriptLines.text: By the first storm of winter, more news. There was a war against orcs somewhere off far to the east, spreading through Dunmar and tearing the land apart.

of 1749, with news of peace, it seems the fighting in Dunmar was over, though tales differed about who was king now there.

transcriptLines.text: But few in Hamri really cared about the events of far-off Dunmar. The traders from Chardon whispered that something seemed wrong. While the amount of chalyte flowing into the city was greater than ever, constant shortages led to the first outbreak of cholera in years, though Kaiso would point out, the traders don't seem to count the sickness that spreads in the slums of the North Bank there.

transcriptLines.text: It is now May 26, 1749. Not long ago, news reached Hamri of a vicious, unprovoked magical attack at the heart of Chardon itself, caused by none other than two of the thieves, Kenzo, a Dunmari spy, and Delwath, an evil elf, corrupted by shadows.

beat.title: Finding the Buried Shrine
beat.boundaryReason: The next phase is the search itself: the party heads to the cliffs, uses Ryu's scouting and Ovina's memory to identify the right sea cave, and confirms that the old shrine of Guzu collapsed about a century earlier.
dateEvidence: the party leaves the Leviathan immediately after the dinner-time discussion
the cave search proceeds as one uninterrupted outing with no sleep or return to town in between

beat.title: Secrets of Guzu's Shrine
beat.boundaryReason: Inside the temple the party investigates the statue, inscriptions, offerings, and chapel, discovers the prayer that opens the hidden passage, and reveals the trapped water boss holding the song fragment behind the vanished stone door.
dateEvidence: the shrine exploration follows directly from the cave-beach negotiation with no pause
the secret-door prayer and reveal of the inner chamber all occur before initiative and within the same cave expedition
no transcript cue suggests dawn, rest, or any date advance before the boss confrontation begins

beat.title: A Bad Deal Offered
beat.boundaryReason: Before initiative starts, the party tries to bluff and bargain with the trapped elemental, learns how the blue light and shard confinement work, debates whether to let him go, and finally shifts from talk to a plan to bottle him up and fight in the temple.
dateEvidence: this scene begins immediately on the boss reveal, before anyone rolls initiative
the entire exchange is one continuous negotiation and tactical debate in the same temple chamber
u1613 is the first actual initiative call, so everything before it remains part of the same uninterrupted nighttime standoff

dateEvidence: this beat begins mid-initiative directly after Geo falls
the transcript presents the blue light's interference and the boss's bloodied state as one continuous combat phase
there is no rest, withdrawal, or scene change before u2171 marks the boss reeling under Wazir's hits

beat.title: Mist and Running Water
beat.boundaryReason: With the boss desperate, the battle shifts again: scalding water erupts near Ryu, the minions swarm and start breaking, the elemental turns to mist to slip through the wall, and the party fights to keep control of the beach-temple choke point.
dateEvidence: the beat starts as the bloodied boss's allies and ranged attacks change the fight's shape
the mist-form escape attempt and the ongoing minion melee are part of the same uninterrupted initiative sequence

beat.boundaryReason: The final stretch covers the fight's cleanup and immediate aftermath: the remaining creatures flee or are cut down, the boss dies with a threat in the wind, Nerissa hears the crystal's grateful song, the party loots what little remains, and they return the fragment to Raina before the epilogue in Hamri.
dateEvidence: this beat begins immediately after the boss's wall-escape attempt resolves
